expectations.evidence: Eliminates phrases like 'designed for scalability, reliability, and maintainability' (moved to detail), removes 'coordinate fashion', simplifies 'Web Server is responsible for receiving...' to 'Routes incoming...'
Keeps three-section structure (Overview, Web Server, Message Queue, Database) intact with no reorganization
Uses shorter, punchier sentences ('Routes incoming...' vs 'The Web Server is responsible for receiving...'); each section is 1-2 sentences
Retains all technical info: PostgreSQL choice, ACID guarantees, request validation, authentication, logging, compression, async processing
